title: Define Phase 3 test strategy and verification gates
summary: Specify interruption recovery test matrix, replay determinism checks, integrity mismatch recovery tests, and coverage targets for 0.4.0.
acceptance_criteria: Interruption matrix covers all cut points listed in plan Phase 3.
Replay/rebuild determinism and integrity mismatch recovery tests are defined.
Coverage target and verification gate steps are explicit and measurable.
tasks: Enumerate interruption cut points before/after intent, mutation, state persist, verify, commit.
Define replay/rebuild determinism tests and expected invariants.
Define integrity mismatch recovery scenarios and expected outcomes.
Specify verification gate steps and coverage >= 90% target.
notes: Keep scope limited to test strategy and verification gates for Phase 3.
Do not implement tests in this ticket; only specify them.
